summary: The confirmed Architecture Baseline now identifies Plugin Skills and .opennori state as the agent discovery surface: baseline agent_surfaces includes .codex-plugin/plugin.json and skills/nori-architecture-apply/SKILL.md, package nori Skill routes architecture apply/challenge/build-vs-buy, and .opennori/agent-guide.md remains in sync for project-local context.
reviewability: Inspect baseline agent_surfaces, nori routing, architecture apply Skill, and architecture show output.
limitations: This proves repo-local and package asset discoverability; it does not prove a fresh external Codex Plugin install until plugin installation is tested after publish.
